title: ceratostylis sphaerocephala
intro: Ceratostylis sphaerocephala, also known as the Spiked Orchid or Round-headed Ceratostylis, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ceratostylis sphaerocephala include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
